title: Architect the OpenTelemetry Collector Pipeline
description: Architect OpenTelemetry Collector pipelines to efficiently manage telemetry volume and cost. Implement tail-based sampling strategies to preserve critical error traces while reducing data ingestion. Configure batching processors to optimize telemetry data transmission and resource utilization.
objectives: Architect OpenTelemetry Collector pipelines to efficiently manage telemetry volume and cost.
Implement tail-based sampling strategies to preserve critical error traces while reducing data ingestion.
Configure batching processors to optimize telemetry data transmission and resource utilization.
